acceptInvitation.alreadyMember: You are already a member of this organization.

acceptInvitation.expired: This invitation has expired or was already used. Ask your organization to send a new one.

acceptInvitation.missingToken: This invitation link is missing its token. Ask your organization to send a new invitation.

create.subtitle: Set up a shared workspace for your company. You become its first owner.

serverErrors.authorization: You do not have permission to do that.
serverErrors.conflict: This organization changed while you were editing. Reload the page and try again.
serverErrors.duplicate-invitation: A pending invitation for this email already exists.
serverErrors.duplicate-membership: This person is already a member of the organization.
serverErrors.forbidden: You do not have permission to do that.
serverErrors.last-owner: An organization must keep at least one owner. Promote another member to owner first.
serverErrors.not-found: This organization does not exist, or you do not have access to it.
serverErrors.rate-limited: Too many attempts. Wait a moment, then try again.
serverErrors.token-gone: This invitation is no longer valid.
serverErrors.unauthenticated: Your session has expired. Sign in again.
serverErrors.unexpected: Something went wrong on our side. Try again shortly.
serverErrors.validation-failed: Some fields need attention. Review the messages below.
serverErrors.version-conflict: This organization changed while you were editing. Reload the page and try again.

validation.countryInvalid: Enter a two-letter country code, like DE.
validation.emailInvalid: Enter a valid email address, like name@company.com.
validation.emailTooLong: Email addresses can be at most 254 characters.
validation.nameTooLong: Organization names can be at most 120 characters.
validation.nameTooShort: Organization names must be at least 2 characters.
